<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Gets an installable artifact."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/installable-artifacts/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the details of a single installable artifact.
